daily_take.headline: Ducks momentum surge signals sharp bettors are loading up before tonight's puck drop.
daily_take.deck: Oregon jumped 7.5 points to 54.5% overnight on $185K volume, a move that screams late action from the sharps. The market's pricing this as a coin flip, but the directional conviction in the order flow suggests the smart money sees something in matchup dynamics or injury updates that casual bettors missed. If you're fading the move, you're betting against real capital. If you're riding it, you better have your own edge on net, not just price momentum.
